meta.content: Mary's simple recipe for maple bacon donuts makes a sticky, sweet treat with just a hint of salt that you'll keep coming back for.
meta.name: description

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

article.expr:data-gg-post-updated: data:post.lastUpdated and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 and data:post.date and data:post.date.iso8601 and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 != data:post.date.iso8601 ? data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 : ""

b:if.cond: (data:post.date and data:post.date.iso8601) or (data:post.lastUpdated and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 and data:post.date and data:post.date.iso8601 and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 != data:post.date.iso8601)
data:post.lastUpdated and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 and data:post.date and data:post.date.iso8601 and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 != data:post.date.iso8601

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons
